mapper.sql: track.id track_id, track.album_id, track.track_title, track.cover_url, track.media_duration, track.status, max(if(stat.stat_type='0701',stat.stat_num,0)) as playStatNum, max(if(stat.stat_type='0702',stat.stat_num,0)) as collectStatNum, max(if(stat.stat_type='0703',stat.stat_num,0)) as praiseStatNum, max(if(stat.stat_type='0704',stat.stat_num,0)) as commentStatNum
mapper.select:
select
from track_info track inner join track_stat stat on track.id = stat.track_id
track.user_id = #{vo.userId}
and track.status = #{vo.status}
and track.track_title like concat('%',#{vo.trackTitle},'%')
and track.is_deleted = 0 and stat.is_deleted = 0
group by track.id order by track.id desc

select track.id track_id, track.track_title, track.media_duration, track.order_num, track.create_time, max(if(stat.stat_type = '0701', stat.stat_num, 0)) playStatNum, max(if(stat.stat_type = '0704', stat.stat_num, 0)) commentStatNum from track_info track inner join track_stat stat on track.id = stat.track_id where track.album_id = #{albumId} and track.is_deleted = 0 and stat.is_deleted = 0 group by track.id
